basic_details.job_title: NVS Patna Counselor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The latest Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti (NVS Patna) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Counselor posts! Published at NVS Official Website, this new recruitment drive invites eligible candidates for Counselor vacancies. Applicants within the 28 to 50 years age group and possessing a Master’s Degree in Psychology along with a one-year Diploma in Guidance & Counseling can apply online from 11-05-2026 to 21-05-2026. Find all details about the NVS Patna Counselor new vacancy 2026, including eligibility, online form, and notification PDF here.

age_limit.age_details: Above 28 years and below 50 years as on 1st May 2026.
age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 28 years as on 1st May 2026 Maximum Age: 50 years as on 1st May 2026 Age relaxation is applicable as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Psychology and one year Diploma in Guidance & Counseling.
qualification.details: Master's Degree(M.A/M.Sc.) in Psychology from a recognized university or institute. One year Diploma in guidance & counseling from a recognized university or institute. At least one year experience in Guidance & Counseling/ Counseling in educational institutes of central or State or UT Government / Autonomous Bodies of Central or State Government/ Public Sector Undertaking.

selection_process: Shortlisting of candidates based on original certificates and self-attested copies. Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NVS Patna Counselor Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 21-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NVS Patna to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NVS Patna Counselor recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the NVS Patna Counselor recruitment is 21st May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Counselor post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree in Psychology and a one-year Diploma in Guidance & Counseling from a recognized institution.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Counselor position?
faq.answer: The age limit is above 28 years and below 50 years as on 1st May 2026. Age relaxation will be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Counselor post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly consolidated remuneration of Rs. 44,900/-.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the NVS Patna Counselor recruitment?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates can apply online through the official NVS Patna website or the provided application link before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of candidates based on their original certificates and self-attested copies, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the NVS Patna Counselor application?
faq.answer: Yes, the application fee is Rs. 500 for General/OBC candidates. SC/ST/PH candidates are exempted from the application fee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The engagement for the Counselor post is on a contract basis for the session 2026-27.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for NVS Patna Counselor recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article or from the official NVS Patna website.

faq.question: Q10. What is the walk-in date mentioned in the notification?
faq.answer: The walk-in date mentioned for the recruitment process is 27th May 2026.
